system_hints: Oil and gas industry, offshore drilling operations.

candidates.observable_statement: The northern and southern distinct population segments of the lesser prairie-chicken are being removed from the Federal List of Endangered and Threatened Wildlife.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Potential increase in land development and agricultural activities in areas previously restricted due to endangered species protections.
candidates.physical_implication: Possible expansion of agricultural land use and infrastructure development in habitats of the lesser prairie-chicken.

capital_flow_signal_candidates.system_hints: U.S. Navy, construction industry, marine infrastructure.
